meaning: v.浜掔粰,閰瓟,浜掓崲,鎶ョ瓟
examples: Some day I will reciprocate your kindness to me.
Some day I will reciprocate your great kindness to me.
I wasn't sure whether to laugh or to reciprocate with a remark of my own.
If you want to reciprocate this hug, you just squeeze on your deflating jacket.
We pay them to add value and they reciprocate with jobs, goods and art.
